title: Agent Skill Evaluation Case
description: Schema for skill eval cases following Evaluation-Driven Development (EDD). Each case tests one of four failure modes: trigger, execution, token budget, or regression.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this case tests

input.description: The user input or prompt that should trigger the skill

type.description: trigger_positive: should fire. trigger_negative: should NOT fire. execution: tests output quality. regression: tests no degradation when co-loaded

expected_skill.description: The skill name that SHOULD trigger (for positive tests) or SHOULD NOT trigger (for negative tests)

expected_tool_calls.description: Expected tool call trajectory. Order matters for action-allowed skills.

rubric.description: Criteria for LLM-as-Judge evaluation. Each criterion is a single verifiable statement.
